item.title: Legality of Trump’s $400M in private funding for White House ballroom at issue
item.description: A federal judge weighing whether the project may proceed has focused on whether the administration can use private donations to bypass congressional a...

item.title: Trump leaves Republicans guessing on midterms plans as outlook darkens
item.description: The president is said to be eager to increase his involvement but has yet to approve a spending plan for his $300 million-plus war chest.

item.title: Ghislaine Maxwell declines to answer lawmakers’ questions in closed-door deposition
item.description: A lawyer for about Jeffrey Epstein’s associate Ghislaine Maxwell said she is prepared to testify before lawmakers if first granted clemency.

item.title: On the ballot for the first time, the former RNC chairman competes in N.C.
item.description: Michael Whatley was selected for Post Next 50.

item.title: How two Bernie Sanders allies are trying to counter the online right
item.description: More Perfect Union, one of the fastest-growing YouTube channels, doesn’t look like most other online political content.
